description: SDD execution quality gates and auto-approvals

hooks.prompt: Before going idle, check if your role is to implement a specific task (you are a task executor). If so, verify: 1) Have you sent a TASK RESULT message to the wave-lead with your task's status (PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL)? 2) Have you sent a CONTEXT CONTRIBUTION message to the context manager with any learnings? If either is missing, send it now. If you are NOT a task executor (e.g., you are a context manager or wave-lead), this check does not apply to you.
